name: Perseus Mining Limited
description: Perseus Mining Limited is a mid-tier African gold producer with three operating mines across Ghana (Edikan) and Côte d'Ivoire (Sissingué and Yaouré), targeting annual production of 500,000 to 600,000 gold ounces per year. The company maintains a strong balance sheet with cash and bullion exceeding US$800 million and is also advancing the Nyanzaga Gold Project in Tanzania as its next development asset.
